patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..642367a 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -449,8 +449,7 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                     pass
             except IndexError:
                 pass
-            if exec_coro.done():
-                raise
+        
             if cancel_parent:
                 exec_coro.cancel()
             ret = await exec_coro
@@ -459,7 +458,6 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             self.deadlock_context.set(False)
 
         return ret
-
     def __get__(
         self, parent: Any, objtype: Any
     ) -> Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]]:
